texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ANNEX XI
texts.text: ANNEX XI

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) - technical documentation for providers of general-purpose AI models
texts.text: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) - technical documentation for providers of general-purpose AI models

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Section  1
texts.text: Section  1

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Information to be provided by all providers of  general-purpose AI  models
texts.text: Information to be provided by all providers of  general-purpose AI  models

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  technical  documentation  referred  to  in  Article  53(1),  point  (a)  shall  contain  at  least  the  following  information  as appropriate to  the  size  and  risk  profile  of  the  model:
texts.text: The  technical  documentation  referred  to  in  Article  53(1),  point  (a)  shall  contain  at  least  the  following  information  as appropriate to  the  size  and  risk  profile  of  the  model:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A general description of the general-purpose AI model including:
texts.text: A general description of the general-purpose AI model including:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the tasks that the model is intended to perform and the type and nature of AI systems in which it can be integrated;
texts.text: (a) the tasks that the model is intended to perform and the type and nature of AI systems in which it can be integrated;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) the acceptable use policies applicable;
texts.text: (b) the acceptable use policies applicable;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) the date of release and methods of distribution;
texts.text: (c) the date of release and methods of distribution;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) the architecture and number of parameters;
texts.text: (d) the architecture and number of parameters;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (e) the modality (e.g. text, image) and format of inputs and outputs;
texts.text: (e) the modality (e.g. text, image) and format of inputs and outputs;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (f) the licence.
texts.text: (f) the licence.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A detailed description of the elements of the model referred to in point 1, and relevant information of the process for the development, including the following elements:
texts.text: A detailed description of the elements of the model referred to in point 1, and relevant information of the process for the development, including the following elements:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the technical means (e.g. instructions of use, infrastructure, tools) required for the general-purpose AI model to be integrated in AI systems;
texts.text: (a) the technical means (e.g. instructions of use, infrastructure, tools) required for the general-purpose AI model to be integrated in AI systems;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) the design specifications of the model and training process, including training methodologies and techniques, the key design choices including the rationale and assumptions made; what the model is designed to optimise for and the relevance of the different parameters, as applicable;
texts.text: (b) the design specifications of the model and training process, including training methodologies and techniques, the key design choices including the rationale and assumptions made; what the model is designed to optimise for and the relevance of the different parameters, as applicable;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) information on the data used for training, testing and validation, where applicable, including the type and provenance of data and curation methodologies (e.g. cleaning, filtering, etc.), the number of data points, their scope and main characteristics; how the data was obtained and selected as well as all other measures to detect the unsuitability of data sources and methods to detect identifiable biases, where applicable;
texts.text: (c) information on the data used for training, testing and validation, where applicable, including the type and provenance of data and curation methodologies (e.g. cleaning, filtering, etc.), the number of data points, their scope and main characteristics; how the data was obtained and selected as well as all other measures to detect the unsuitability of data sources and methods to detect identifiable biases, where applicable;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) the computational resources used to train the model (e.g. number of floating point operations), training time, and other relevant details related to the training;
texts.text: (d) the computational resources used to train the model (e.g. number of floating point operations), training time, and other relevant details related to the training;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (e) known or estimated energy consumption of the model.
texts.text: (e) known or estimated energy consumption of the model.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: With regard to point (e), where the energy consumption of the model is unknown, the energy consumption may be based  on  information  about  computational  resources  used.
texts.text: With regard to point (e), where the energy consumption of the model is unknown, the energy consumption may be based  on  information  about  computational  resources  used.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Section  2
texts.text: Section  2

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Additional  information  to  be  provided  by  providers  of  general-purpose  AI  models  with  systemic  risk
texts.text: Additional  information  to  be  provided  by  providers  of  general-purpose  AI  models  with  systemic  risk

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A detailed description of the evaluation strategies, including evaluation results, on the basis of available public evaluation protocols and tools or otherwise of other evaluation methodologies. Evaluation strategies shall include evaluation criteria, metrics and the methodology on the identification of limitations.
texts.text: A detailed description of the evaluation strategies, including evaluation results, on the basis of available public evaluation protocols and tools or otherwise of other evaluation methodologies. Evaluation strategies shall include evaluation criteria, metrics and the methodology on the identification of limitations.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Where applicable, a detailed description of the measures put in place for the purpose of conducting internal and/or external adversarial testing (e.g. red teaming), model adaptations, including alignment and fine-tuning.
texts.text: Where applicable, a detailed description of the measures put in place for the purpose of conducting internal and/or external adversarial testing (e.g. red teaming), model adaptations, including alignment and fine-tuning.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: EN
texts.text: EN

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Where applicable, a detailed description of the system architecture explaining how software components build or feed into each other and integrate into the overall processing.
texts.text: Where applicable, a detailed description of the system architecture explaining how software components build or feed into each other and integrate into the overall processing.

texts.text: The information referred to in Article  53(1),  point  (b)  shall  contain  at  least  the  following:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A general description of the general-purpose AI model including:
texts.text: A general description of the general-purpose AI model including:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the tasks that the model is intended to perform and the type and nature of AI systems into which it can be integrated;
texts.text: (a) the tasks that the model is intended to perform and the type and nature of AI systems into which it can be integrated;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) the acceptable use policies applicable;
texts.text: (b) the acceptable use policies applicable;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) the date of release and methods of distribution;
texts.text: (c) the date of release and methods of distribution;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) how the model interacts, or can be used to interact, with hardware or software that is not part of the model itself, where applicable;
texts.text: (d) how the model interacts, or can be used to interact, with hardware or software that is not part of the model itself, where applicable;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (e) the versions of relevant software related to the use of the general-purpose AI model, where applicable;
texts.text: (e) the versions of relevant software related to the use of the general-purpose AI model, where applicable;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (f) the architecture and number of parameters;
texts.text: (f) the architecture and number of parameters;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (g) the modality (e.g. text, image) and format of inputs and outputs;
texts.text: (g) the modality (e.g. text, image) and format of inputs and outputs;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (h) the licence for the model.
texts.text: (h) the licence for the model.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A description of the elements of the model and of the process for its development, including:
texts.text: A description of the elements of the model and of the process for its development, including:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the technical means (e.g. instructions for use, infrastructure, tools) required for the general-purpose AI model to be integrated into AI systems;
texts.text: (a) the technical means (e.g. instructions for use, infrastructure, tools) required for the general-purpose AI model to be integrated into AI systems;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) the modality (e.g. text, image, etc.) and format of the inputs and outputs and their maximum size (e.g. context window length, etc.);
texts.text: (b) the modality (e.g. text, image, etc.) and format of the inputs and outputs and their maximum size (e.g. context window length, etc.);

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) information on the data used for training, testing and validation, where applicable, including the type and provenance of data and curation methodologies.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ANNEX XIII
texts.text: ANNEX XIII

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Criteria for the designation of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk referred to in Article 51
texts.text: Criteria for the designation of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk referred to in Article 51

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For the purpose of determining that a general-purpose AI model has capabilities or an impact equivalent to those set out in Article  51(1),  point  (a),  the  Commission  shall  take  into  account  the  following  criteria:
texts.text: For the purpose of determining that a general-purpose AI model has capabilities or an impact equivalent to those set out in Article  51(1),  point  (a),  the  Commission  shall  take  into  account  the  following  criteria:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the number of parameters of the model;
texts.text: (a) the number of parameters of the model;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) the quality or size of the data set, for example measured through tokens;
texts.text: (b) the quality or size of the data set, for example measured through tokens;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) the amount of computation used for training the model, measured in floating point operations or indicated by a combination of other variables such as estimated cost of training, estimated time required for the training, or estimated energy consumption for the training;
texts.text: (c) the amount of computation used for training the model, measured in floating point operations or indicated by a combination of other variables such as estimated cost of training, estimated time required for the training, or estimated energy consumption for the training;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) the input and output modalities of the model, such as text to text (large language models), text to image, multi-modality, and the state of the art thresholds for determining high-impact capabilities for each modality, and the specific type of inputs and outputs (e.g. biological sequences);
texts.text: (d) the input and output modalities of the model, such as text to text (large language models), text to image, multi-modality, and the state of the art thresholds for determining high-impact capabilities for each modality, and the specific type of inputs and outputs (e.g. biological sequences);

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (e) the benchmarks and evaluations of capabilities of the model, including considering the number of tasks without additional training, adaptability to learn new, distinct tasks, its level of autonomy and scalability, the tools it has access to;
texts.text: (e) the benchmarks and evaluations of capabilities of the model, including considering the number of tasks without additional training, adaptability to learn new, distinct tasks, its level of autonomy and scalability, the tools it has access to;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (f) whether it has a high impact on the internal market due to its reach, which shall be presumed when it has been made available to at least 10 000 registered business users established in the Union;
texts.text: (f) whether it has a high impact on the internal market due to its reach, which shall be presumed when it has been made available to at least 10 000 registered business users established in the Union;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (g) the number of registered end-users.
texts.text: (g) the number of registered end-users.
